title: hieracium rigidum subsp. boreanum
intro: Hieracium rigidum subsp. boreanum, also known as the boreal hawkweed, is a subspecies of the Hieracium rigidum plant, belonging to the dandelion family and native to the mountainous regions of Europe. The medicinal properties of Hieracium rigidum subsp. boreanum include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help to soothe wounds and reduce inflammation. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to promote wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues. In herbal preparations, the plant can be used in teas, tinctures, or infusions to harness its medicinal properties, often used in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions.
